import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import Header from './Header'; import 'bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css'; import '@fortawesome/fontawesome-free/css/all.min.css'; const RFIDIntegration = () => { const [userInfo, setUserInfo] = useState({}); useEffect(() => { const userInfo = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('userInfo')) || {}; setUserInfo(userInfo); }, []); // Common style objects const buttonHoverStyles = { transform: 'translateY(-2px)', boxShadow: '0 6px 20px rgba(84, 112, 255, 0.4)' }; const buttonResetStyles = { transform: 'translateY(0)', boxShadow: '0 4px 14px rgba(84, 112, 255, 0.3)' }; return (

RFID Integration

Follow these steps to seamlessly integrate RFID technology with your existing systems.

Adding Products or Inventory

Reusable Tag

  1. 1 First, scan the RFID tag to get the EPC code.
  2. 2 Use the "Add Product" API endpoint with the scanned EPC.
  3. 3 Provide product details (ID, name, description, etc.) in the request.
  4. 4 The system will register the tag for reuse with your inventory.

Single Time Use Tag

  1. 1 Scan the new RFID tag to get its unique EPC.
  2. 2 Use the "Add Single Use Product" API endpoint.
  3. 3 Include all required product information along with the EPC.
  4. 4 The tag will be marked for single-use in your inventory.

Invoicing Products

Single Time Use Tag

  1. 1 Scan all single-use tags that need to be invoiced.
  2. 2 Use the "Create Invoice" API with all scanned EPCs.
  3. 3 The system will automatically mark these items as sold.
  4. 4 The tags will be deactivated after successful invoicing.

Reusable Tag

  1. 1 Scan all reusable tags to be included in the invoice.
  2. 2 Use the "Create Reusable Invoice" API endpoint with the scanned EPCs.
  3. 3 Specify the quantity being invoiced for each reusable tag.
  4. 4 The system will update inventory counts while keeping tags active.

For detailed API documentation and testing tools, please refer to the Dashboard page.

{ e.currentTarget.style.background = 'linear-gradient(45deg, #4560EB, #5A7DF0)'; Object.assign(e.currentTarget.style, buttonHoverStyles); }} onMouseOut={(e) => { e.currentTarget.style.background = 'linear-gradient(45deg, #5470FF, #6C8FFF)'; Object.assign(e.currentTarget.style, buttonResetStyles); }} > Back to Dashboard
); }; export default RFIDIntegration;
